subject.description: REQUIRED. Short Task subject from the user (e.g. 'Call Acme about pricing'). Extract the core action, not the whole sentence if redundant.

description.description: Optional Task body / extra context from the user message.

activityDate.description: Due date. BEST: YYYY-MM-DD computed from user wording (e.g. 'tomorrow' → actual calendar tomorrow). ALSO allowed: literal words today | tomorrow | yesterday (server parses). Omit to default to today.

priority.description: High if user signals urgency; else Normal or omit.

accountName.description: Company / Account name from the user when they mention who the task is about (e.g. 'Acme') but did NOT give a Salesforce Id. Server resolves to WhatId when exactly one Account matches. If multiple match, response asks for disambiguation — then pass whatId. Omit if whatId is set.

whatId.description: Optional 15/18 char Salesforce Id for related record (Account 001…, Opportunity 006…, etc.) ONLY when user or prior tool output provided the Id.

whoId.description: Optional Contact 003… or Lead 00Q… Id only if explicitly given.
